description:
Letter from Yehuda b. Ṭuviyyahu to Moshe Maimonides. In Hebrew and Judaeo-Arabic. Congratulating him on his marriage? Dating: ca. 1168–1204 CE, based on the years when Maimonides was active in Egypt.

NB: The identifications and bibliography on FGP (an autograph responsum of Avraham Maimonides) actually refer to MS 8254, fol. 17.
description_he: מכתב בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
